title: 10 best herbal tinctures for toothache
description: Black pepper tinctures helps with toothache because of its natural analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The piperine in black pepper has been shown to reduce pain and swelling by blocking the production of pro-inflammatory compounds in the body. When applied topically to a sore tooth or gums, the tincture can help alleviate discomfort and promote healing. Additionally, its antibacterial properties may also help combat underlying infections that contribute to toothaches. By using...
